Saya berkunjung ke Solaria pada Sabtu, 29 November sekitar pukul 20.30. Sayangnya, saya mendapat pengalaman pelayanan yang kurang baik dari salah satu pelayan bernama Nisa Ulfadila.
 Saat saya memanggil, saya hanya berkata “mbak”, namun ia tidak menoleh sama sekali, tidak melihat ke saya, dan hanya mengatakan “bentar ya” dengan ekspresi yang terkesan tidak sopan. Saya paham kalau kondisi sedang ramai atau ia sedang mengantar makanan, tapi seharusnya minimal menatap customer sebentar untuk mengetahui apa kebutuhan saya, lalu menjelaskan kalau ia akan membantu setelah selesai.
 Kebutuhan saya saat itu sederhana, yaitu meminta piring kotor di meja dibersihkan. Bahkan setelah ia selesai mengantar makanan, ia tidak kembali ke meja saya untuk menanyakan kebutuhan saya. Padahal saya melihat pelayan lain bisa merespons customer dengan baik dan langsung mengarahkan staf yang bertugas membersihkan piring.
 Menurut saya, pelayanan seperti ini tidak mencerminkan standar Solaria. Semoga bisa menjadi perhatian manajemen agar kualitas pelayanan lebih konsisten.

Saya datang dengan ekspektasi tinggi untuk menikmati ramen yang lezat, namun sayangnya pengalaman yang saya dapatkan jauh dari harapan. Ketika ramen disajikan, aroma kuahnya langsung terasa tidak biasa—cukup aneh dan mengganggu selera. Setelah saya cicipi, rasanya pun tidak seperti ramen pada umumnya; terasa aneh, tidak segar, dan membuat kami khawatir soal kebersihannya.
 
 Karena khawatir akan berdampak pada kesehatan, kami hanya mencicipi sedikit dan memutuskan untuk tidak melanjutkan. Seperti terlihat pada foto yang saya unggah, sebagian besar makanan masih utuh dan tidak tersentuh.
 
 Hal yang juga cukup mengecewakan adalah tidak adanya inisiatif dari staf untuk menanyakan alasan mengapa makanan kami tidak dimakan saat proses pembayaran. Padahal, hal ini bisa menjadi masukan penting bagi perbaikan ke depannya.
 
 Sayang sekali, karena saya datang dengan niat menikmati, namun pulang dengan rasa kecewa.

Tadi habis reunian sama temen, terus jadi inget 2022 saat kita diundang liputan media gathering BRI terus dr humas dan direksi saranin kita ngopi sambil ngetik berita di sini. Tapi yang terjadi apa? Kita dijudesin dr awal masuk, kita nanya2 menu favorit no respon, terus kita cm pesen kopi aja ada pelayan yg dtg 2x tanya ini aja pesenannya? Dan emang kenyataannya kita sekenyang itu krn habis makan di acara BRI. Kita mau pesen camilan tp krn pas ditanya best sellernya apa mereka no respon yaudah kita minum aja. Saat itu jam 2 kita dtg dan jam 4 kita disamperin pelayan dan blg mereka mau tutup jadi kita disuruh pergi inget banget dibilang "kita sebentar lagi tutup jadi segera payment ya mbak," langsung kita tatap2an padahal mereka tau laptop sm beberapa alat liputan kita mentereng krn masih gelut sm kerjaan. But its oke. Jadi pengalaman lucu kalau reunian sm temen wartawan. Gak peduli seenak apa masakan kalian manner is number 1 right? Btw sengaja review di sini krn diig commentnya gak bs terus. Soalnya temenku sampe trauma ke cafe cm pesen kopi aja grgr ini. Kalaupun awalnya cm pesen kopi aja gak nutup akan tambah menu, dan itu kita tanya baik2 camilan best sellernya apa tapi no respon dan jutek apa gak bikin kita males. Agak telat reviewnya cm berharap sekarang udh lebih baik ya.

I visited The Chinese National Restaurant for the “Seafood Night Market” dinner buffet around 8 PM, and the experience was deeply disappointing. Despite the theme, there was almost no seafood available. The only items that could be considered seafood were the crab soup and grilled fish that was unfortunately overcooked and tough. The presentation of this buffet as a “Seafood Night Market” is, quite frankly, misleading.
 
 Among the offerings, the dim sum was the only item that stood out as genuinely enjoyable. The rest of the selection fell far below the standard expected from a restaurant of this reputation and price point.
 
 The most concerning issue, however, was the chefs professionalism. The buffet included a labelled sushi section, yet the tray was completely empty. When we inquired, a female chef approached and informed us she would request a refill from the kitchen. Before doing so, she checked with another chef stationed nearby(hot food and pasta station), and I overheard them said like, “well this is a Chinese restaurant, not Japanese,” followed by laughter.
 
 This behavior is highly unprofessional. If the restaurant does not intend to provide sushi or cannot maintain the station properly, then DON’T MAKE IT AS PART OF THE BUFFET! don’t mislead customers and then joke about it five steps away from the people who are literally asking for it. This really reflects poorly on the establishment and its commitment to service integrity.
 
 Overall, the experience was far below expectations, from the misleading theme to the lackluster food selection and the concerning staff conduct. Unfortunately, I cannot recommend this buffet, nor do I believe it offers value for its price.

19.30, we paid 175k to enter Ancol just to have a burger here, but at 19.30 they were already closed!!! Good burger but if I cant trust them to be open when I come here I simply wont come back. And i cant recommend others to gamble on whether they'll close early or not.

This was, without a doubt, the worst burger I’ve ever had in my life. The premium price they charge, you’d expect a burger of high quality. Unfortunately, that was not the case here.
 
 - Bacon: Completely dry and burnt. Absolutely inedible.
 
 - Smoked Beef Brisket: Overwhelmingly sweet to the point that it masked any other flavor. It felt like eating sugar with meat.
 
 - Bun: Way too thick compared to the filling, and to make it worse, it was cold.
 
 - Fries: Even something as simple as fries was ruined. They were over-fried, causing them to absorb way too much oil, leaving them greasy and unpleasant.
 
 Total disappointment. Would not recommend.
 
 The only saving grace was the environment, the view was nice with a gentle sea breeze.

I originally ate here with two friends in early 2024. And of course, I had delicious food and good service.
 
 And in August 2025, I invited my fiancée to dine here to celebrate her birthday, because I'd been treated well before.
 At first, there were no major issues. Everything went smoothly.
 
 Until finally, my fiancée raised her hand and called a male waiter for a tissue. The waiter was actually escorting a new customer, and when he stood next to my fiancée, he yelled at her, "HOLD ON! I'M ACCEPTING A CUSTOMER! CAN YOU WAIT A MOMENT!?"
 I was also startled by the waiter's loud voice. Even several other guests who were eating immediately turned and stopped eating.
 
 My fiancée just glared at him, and of course, so did I. We didn't expect to be yelled at like that. Even new customers were staring at him.
 
 After that, my fiancée continued to politely ask for tissues. And the waiter changed his manner of speaking to a polite one, too. He seemed like someone suffering from emotional instability.
 
 I often eat at places less luxurious than Yakiniku Like, so I considered Yakiniku Like, at least, one of the places that understood how to serve others.
 Well, unfortunately, my opinion has completely changed now.
 
 To you, waiter named "ARDAN." I hope Yakiniku Like takes better care of your psychological issues.

Two Stars – A Shadow of Its Former Self
 
 About 8 years ago, 1945 used to be one of the best restaurants in Jakarta—refined Indonesian cuisine, great execution, and a real sense of occasion.
 
 Unfortunately, those days are long gone. Since then, they’ve changed head chefs and menus multiple times, and I’ve given each new iteration a fair shot. But every time, it’s the same story: uninspired dishes, inconsistent execution, and nothing that stands out.
 
 It’s sad to see a place that once had such a strong identity now feel like it’s just going through the motions. It hasn’t impressed me in years.

I visited on 21st September 2025 and unfortunately the service was very poor. I came in wearing a casual outfit since the restaurant is near my home and I just wanted to have a quick lunch. The first staff member who greeted us immediately gave off a judgmental attitude, as if assuming we were only there because we had limited budget and were going to use a TikTok voucher. Yes, I know the restaurant offers TikTok food vouchers with discounts of up to 50% on selected items—and for me, that was perfectly fine.
 
 However, I noticed that many of the staff provided noticeably different service to guests who came to redeem the TikTok voucher. As someone who also works in F&B service at a 5-star hotel, I found this behavior very disappointing. All guests should be treated equally, no matter what kind of promotion they choose to use.
 
 Please train your staff better—not to judge guests or make them feel looked down upon in any situation.

Pengalaman yg menyakitkan hati makan disini.
 Sy merencanakan bukber bersama keluarga disini karena memang dekat dengan tempat tinggal mereka, tgl 14 sy sdh reservasi dan bayar makanan untuk tgl 16 hari minggu.
 Sampailah disana sekitar jam 5an lewat, kami dipersilakan duduk di tempat yg sdh disediakan meja digabung dan itu sempit untuk kita yg ber9.
 Kebetulan sy lihat ada meja kosong di pojok dekat dengan tempat kami, meja lagi mau di bersihkan, sy minta pengen pindah kesitu karena sepertinya enak buat ponakan duduk kalo di pojok(ada sofa). Ternyata gak dikasih katanya kalo digabungkan harus 12 orang (maaf sy ber9 pesan makanan sudah lebih untuk 12orang) sy diam aja gak berani ngomong karena lg puasa juga.. Setelah waktu berbuka tiba, datanglah orang ber5 dengan santainya di persilahkan duduk ditempat itu dan dikasi buku menu(berarti belum reservasi sebelumnya kan?) sedangkan sy sdh reservasi jauh2 hari dan sdh fix dngn pesanannya di kasi tempat yg sempit begitu ( kecewa beneran).. gak lama dateng lagi orang ber5 juga dipersilakan duduk disitu sebelahnya yg ber5 tadi, dikasi buku menu(berarti belum reservasi juga)..
 Gimana tuh coba? Kesinggunglh sy, kenapa gak boleh sih td sy minta disitu(mikirnya enak ponakan bisa agak luas di pojok)..
 Buat km yg gak bolehin kami duduk ditempat itu coba baca cerita sy ini, posisikan kamu jadi sy.
 Menghargai orang gak harus sama orang yg terlihat kaya dan gaya, semua sama dihadapan yg Maha Kuasa.
 Kecewa, menyakitkan perasaan.

*Mediocre Broth and Unwelcome Interruptions*
 
 Sop & Soto Betawi Bang Budi specializes in classic Betawi-style soto and sop, featuring rich coconut-milk broths served with beef, offal, and the usual accompaniments. Priced affordably (most bowls under IDR 50,000), it attracts students and local residents, with delivery options available through GoFood and GrabFood. The venue’s official Facebook page (with modest engagement) and scattered reviews on Google Maps and Pergikuliner generally highlight generous portions and a straightforward, no-frills dining experience typical of a neighborhood warung.
 
 From personal experience, the Soto Betawi was unfortunately mediocre—lacking the robust, layered flavor expected from a good Betawi broth. The lung meat was noticeably dry and tough. To compound the disappointment, more than one busker approached the premises during the meal, persistently interrupting and ultimately ruining what should have been a relaxed dining moment.
 
 While this place offers convenient hours and wallet-friendly prices for everyday Betawi soup cravings, the execution falls short of memorable, and the open-air setting invites unwanted disturbances. It may suffice for a quick, inexpensive bite, but those seeking authentic depth of flavor or a peaceful meal are advised to look elsewhere ⭐️⭐️
Untuk rasa biasa aja, belum level soto betawi yang otentik. Mungkin tidak ada pilihan lagi untuk daerah sekitarnya.

Datang ke sini tgl 1 Oktober 2025. Pertama kali tau dari FYP Instagram, keliatannya enak banget. Tapi lumayan kecewa dari sisi pelayanan masih banyak banget yang harus diperbaiki.
 
 1. Ketersediaan makanan banyak yg gak available: Banyak banget makanan yang ga available tapi ga ditandain di menu ga cuma satu. Pengen pesen Oishi Choco, ga ada, akhirnya pesen Creamy Mango. Oke gapapa. Trus pengen beli appetizer Gyoza, ga ada juga. Akhirnya ganti yg lain.
 
 Temen pengen beli Sanemi Don, ternyata gambar sama aslinya beda. Ya kan bisa diganti atau dikasih keterangan dong? Jamurnya juga diganti Enoki, which is itu murah ya harusnya, tapi harganya sama aja.
 
 2. Product knowledge pelayan agak rendah: Pelayannya banyak yang ga ngerti menunya apa, ingredients nya apa, jadinya malah panggil temennya dan agak wasting time. Seharusnya semua udah tau basic knowledge product makanannya apa jadi kita sbg customer jg bisa puas.
 
 3. Music terlalu kencang dan gak pake Spotify Premium: Volume suara kenceng banget dan ga pake spotify premium, jadi keganggu ada suara iklan, at least bisa berlangganan platform premium supaya customer juga merasa nyaman. Playlistnya lumayan oke, tapi suaranya kekencengan.
 
 4. Amenities di meja terlalu sedikit, mungkin bisa ditambah kecap manis dan saus sambal karena menunya banyak yg gorengan, jadi ga perlu bolak-balik minta saos

Saya termasuk jarang review restauran, tp kali ini harus. Jadi kami reservasi untuk buka puasa. Sampai di restauran jam 17.38. Sudah ada 4 takjil. Jam 18-an minuman yg dipesan datang. Tampaknya akan berjalan baik2 saja, karena buka puasa jam 18.05.
 
 Saat jam berbuka datang, kita minum dan makan takjil yg disediakan. Tp sampai 18.10 kok makanan gak datang2, padahal tamu lain sudah pada mulai makan. Well,
 
 18.12 pesanan mangut datang. Tp hanya mangut, tanpa nasi dll. Ya belum bisa dimakan jg.
 18.24 pizza pesanan anak pertama datang. Itupun setelah 2x datang ke resepsionis tanya kok pesanan belum ada yg datang. Oklah sang kaka mulai makan. Tp yg lain belum bisa makan, karena mangut gak ada nasi dan pesenan adik, fetucini jg belum datang.
 18.25 kentang pasangan pizza datang. Yg lain masih mlongo.
 18.26 nasi dan tempe dateng. Kami ortu mau makan mangut tetap gak mulai, karena kasian si adek makanan belum datang.
 18.29 tahu pasangan tempe dari paket mangut datang. Kami tetap belum makan, kasian adek pesenannya belum datang.
 18.31 pizza sang kakak habis sementara kami belum mulai makan
 18.35 fetucini datang. Barulah kami bisa makan. Tadinya excited, jadinya lemes dan udah gak kepengenan mikir ini makanan enak atau nggak. Semua jadi hambar.
 
 Mungkin saya terlalu demanding, tp untuk buka puasa dgn sistem reservasi dan bayar uang muka, buat saya sangat gak pas. Mungkin dalam suasana lain ini gak jadi masalah. Tp dalam situasi saya, cukup untuk menyimpulkan untuk tidak akan pernah kembali ke sini. Mangut masih bisa didapatkan di tempat lain. Gak perlu ada alasan untuk kembali ke sini. Ngapain.

Went for dinner without any reservation. Was told the place was fully booked and the server asked if it was ok for us to sit at the K22 Bar Terrace which was outdoor without aircon instead of waiting for a table in the restaurant. We went with the seating at K22 Bar Terrace and we could order food from View to be served there.
 
 Luckily the night was windy and not hot to sit outdoor. We ordered some appetizers and a couple of mains.
 
 Wagyu Rump Bites (8.5/10) - Great recommendation by the male server to order this dish. The wagyu meat was well seasoned and cooked tender. Compliments well with the garlic chips topping. A must order!
 
 Blue Crab Tartare on Crackers (5/10) - Crab taste not prominent in the dish and kinda bland. Should reduce the serving of crackers and portion up the crab meat. Lack of acidity too to bring out the sweetness of crab meat.
 
 Grilled Scallops (8.5/10) - Plump scallops ans nicely cooked. Slightly seared on the edge and yet the meat still juicy and bouncy. The green apple and jalapeno sauce compliments well with the scallops and brought out the seafood sweetness. Must try dish!
 
 Poached Pear Salad (8/10) - Another well thought dish. Very refreshing and appetizing salad.
 
 Brussel Sprout (6/10) - The cook on the brussel sprouts were fine but the dressing/sauce sadly ruined the dish. Perhaps should serve the sauce separately if you wish. Too much sauce all over the brussel sprouts and overpowered the natural taste of the vege. And the sauce was too thick and intense (similar to BBQ sauce) which we felt was unpleasant. If without the sauce, will be 7/10.
 
 Australian Black Angus Strip Loin (7/10) - We had it done in medium rare. Not the best steak we had when we came to View Steak for it, so it was kinda disappointing. No doubt the cook was okay but that was about it. Could do more with the char on the outside and abit more seasoning. The beef jus sauce didnt compliment well with the steak despite recommended by the server. We thought the wagyu rump was nicer than this steak.
 
 Miso Glazed Barramundi (3/10) - The worst dish we had that night. Didnt like the overpowering miso glaze. Should use miso with caution cos of the strong taste. Fish was overcooked. Lack of acidity to counter the heavy sauce. Didnt enjoy this dish.
 
 Overall, the bill came to about 2 million IDR with ++. Dining experience not the best cos we didnt get to sit in the View restaurant. Next time will book in advance. Servers were helpful and friendly. Didnt wait too long for the food to be served. Some hits and (more) misses among the dishes.

Compared to a few years ago, the quality and selection of buffet breakfast at Harmony Restaurant has gone down a notch. For example, at the salad bar there was no cherry tomato or pepper, and the lettuce didn't look fresh. You need to wait in a long line at the egg station also for sausages? Maybe it's better to add more cooks at the station and pre-cook some omelettes beforehand. At the fruit bar, even the cheap papaya and cantaloupe were not that sweet. Can somebody at least check (pre taste) before serving? Also there's no apples and oranges. There's only 1 small coffee machine for such a large restaurant, twice I had to look for a staff to refill water or coffee beans. Quite frustrating, especially since having a great coffee is such an important morning ritual for many people. Overall, it's not worth the money anymore!

Ada plus minus dari pengalaman yang saya rasakan. Ini kunjungan saya kembali setelah sekian lama tidak makan ini di cabang KoKas.
 
 Plus: makanan enak. Dagingnya benar-benar empuk. Free waffle dan puding sebagai makanan penutup. Sayang es krim ga available. Pelayanan sangat baik.
 
 Minus: meski service baik, justru ini juga minusnya terkait pelayanan. Saya baru menyadari ini ketika sudah pulang. Saya memesan tambahan yaki udon (yang harganya 58k) dan 1 set menu.
 
 Sup yang didapat dari set menu tidak diantar. Saat saya ingatkan baru diberikan. Yang parah adalah Yaki Udon yang saya bayar tidak saya dapatkan. Saya baru menyadari ini karena porsi yang saya dapatkan saat itu benar-benar sangat sedikit (karena dibagi 2). Saya pikir ini adalah porsi standarnya sehingga saat itu saya tidak bertanya.
 
 Tolong bagian pelayan dan dapur koordinasi dengan benar karena ada 2 menu yang tidak diberikan.
 
 Untuk harga, menurut saya tidak sepadan dengan apa yang didapat. Soal porsi seharusnya lebih baik lagi.

Order makanan di resto 11.17 sampe jam 12.45 untuk gurame dan patin bambunya serta tahu kipas 2 porsi belum keluar, akhirnya saya tanya ke karyawan nya bilangnya mau dicheck cm saya tunggu ga ada info, saya tanya ke yg lain jg ga ada info, ini customer dibuat bingung, akhirnya saya panggil karyawannnya bt check makanan apa aja yg belum keluar di kertas yg ditempel dimeja. Yang bikin saya kecewa masalahnya saya bawa org tua usia 77 tahun nunggu lama makanan utama nya keluar, kita 8 org lauknya yg keluar cuma ayam 4 potong jamur sayur asem dan kangkung karedok. text: The food was enjoyable, but the overall dining experience was marred by the owner's wife's intrusive behavior. She frequently hovered around our table, attempting to speak Mandarin with us, which felt unnecessarily invasive. Her constant presence created an awkward atmosphere, leaving us feeling rushed and uncomfortable. This detracted significantly from what could have been a satisfying meal, despite the quality of the food.

We did not try the ala carte menu. We only tried their hotpot with Mala broth, collagen and tom yum broth. The broth were tasty but the service was a different story. The staffs were sooo slow, and you had to chase them for refill your tea and even helped you with cooking the food, otherwise they would ignore you. This restaurant has plenty staffs but most of them would rather just to chat among themselves and working so slow. Too bad honestly. We did not enjoy the dinner.
Rasa biasa aja. Harga cukup bersahabat. Recommended utk orang yg mau makan sambil berhemat.

(수정) 그 이후로 이 식당을 제법 다녔는데 리뷰 추가가 없었네요. 그 후 식당 내부도 리노베이션 해서 더 넓어지고 깔끔해졌어요. 사장님 말씀대로 메뉴도 다양해지고 더 맛있어졌고요. 점심 시간에 가보면 종전보다 훨씬 많은 손님들이 식사하고 있더라고요. 한국으로 귀국했다 이번에 간만에 자카르타 갔을 때 대감집 가서 콩나물 해장국으로 해장했는데 아주 좋았아요. 별 개수도 더 올립니다 ㅎㅎ (당초) 당초 두부가 맛있어서 유명했던 식당. 당시에는 다른 식당에서는 두부 만드는 간수를 인니산으로 사용하여 두부가 상한 것 같이 시큼한 반면 이 식당은 한국식으로 만들어서 시큼한 맛이 전혀 없어서 아주 인기가 많았던. 이제는 웬만한 식당과 마트에서도 한국식으로 만들어 파니 이 식당만의 특징이 사라졌달까. 이젠 두부 외 다른 메뉴에도 집중해보자. 새로 바뀐 여사장님이 아주 열심이신 식당!...

모두 음식을 픽업해서 먹었다. 거의 모든 종류의 치킨, 뼈없는 치킨, 강정 등을 먹었는데 가격대비 그맛인듯 하다. 인도네시화 되지 않은 한국식 느낌이다. 치킨중에는 바베큐 추천. 개인적으로 이곳의 닭똥집은 데리야끼도 맛있고 닭똥집 튀김은 반죽에 매콤함이 베어 맥주와 같이 먹으면 최고의 안주로 꼽힌다. 또한 이곳에는 빈땅 맥주를 싸게 파니 꼭 사다 두면 좋다. 밥은 인도네시아 식이니, 치킨 종류로만은 괜찮다. 솔직히 친절함은 모르겠다.

Agak bingung kenapa gabisa bareng dateng nya, sehingga yg nikudon mozza udah keburu dingin duluan, karena juga tidak disediakan alat makan dari awal (kata staff nya lagi kehabisan). Mungkin bisa diperbaiki untuk sisi ini. Miso soup standar rasanya, mungkin bisa di tingkatkan juga. Untuk area yang saya duduki adalah indoor smoking, kurang tau kalau ada area indoor lain yang non-smoking, yang mungkin ini akan membuat yang tidak merokok kurang nyaman dan tidak kids friendly.

Fajar is another OG Chinese restaurant that has been in business for ages. It has moved several times but the food continues to maintain the nostalgic taste from a while back. The atmosphere is very typical of an old school, Chinese restaurant designed for quick family dinners without the glitz and glam - lots of big tables and a wide open space, with outdated decor.
 
 Personally, since I have been coming here from very young - I have a bias for the nostalgic and comfort of the food but I still think Fajar is a hidden gem with delicious Chinese dishes worth trying. Recommend getting the Steamed Hainan chicken - tender and flavorful. Also always get the beef with kailan which is extremely tender and the aromatic and thick sauce is perfect to smother over a side of their just-as-fragrant Hainanese rice. Both the lumpia udang and the udang mayo are delicious, crunchy and juicy. The asparagus crab soup is also a good starter to try.
 
 Service and staff overall is good - the food comes out extremely quick and the waiters are responsive and attentive. Prices are definitely on the higher side, but it’s good to try a variety of dishes to find the ones you enjoy to make it worth it. I feel like most people come here and order the same specific dishes that they enjoy.
 
 Overall, this is comforting Chinese food that I keep coming back to for the nostalgic taste.

This was the last evening in Jakarta and I offered my family to go out for a dinner. I googled the Internet and there were 2 restaurants with top * close to our hotel. I finally stopped at VIEW Bar restaurant at Fairmont hotel. I made a direct booking with Google Calander (for the 1st time) and it was a great positive experience for me I would say. It took us 40-50min drive and the taxi (I don’t know why) took us from the backside entrance )) We managed to go up to the 22 floor (or maybe higher do not remember)
 The place is really beautiful and you can see the Jakarta at night, however the bar is not an open area so when you look through the windows the bar lights retract the lights and you can’t see clear or make photos. We ordered Rid eye and strip loin steaks, 2 Lombok fish fillet, Miso glazed barramundi and 2 salads. We also orders 2 alcohol drinks an, mojito and 2 colas.
 Both fish dishes were excellent and delicious. However, we had some problems with the steaks. It wasn’t chewable, so we asked to fry little more and they did. It got better, but due to much fat in the steak portion it was still unchewable, so we left it. The atmosphere is great, service is excellent, however there are some issues with food to our taste. Overall, good place for your last day in Jakarta, but maybe you should ask for fish, not steaks. The total amount for the above was about 200USD.

Great food at great price. I ordered the meal combo for two at IDR 137k which include: 1) a warm, rich, savory Soto Betawi; 2) one serving of crunchy fried chicken fillet, served with sambal; 3) two pieces of bakwan jagung; 4) two bowls of rice; and 5) two iced teas. I understand IDR 68.5k per person is quite expensive, but considering the portion (it's plenty!) and its location (Grand Indonesia Mall), I would argue it's still a good bargain.
 
 The Soto Betawi is the tastiest among them (tender beef, rich broth, perfect warmth), but all of the food tastes great. If you're looking for affordable food at the fancy Grand Indonesia mall, this is one great alternative.

Indonesian food restaurant. Located in Grand Indonesia West Mall 5th floor inside Foodprint. They serve foods like: Iga Bakar sapi (grilled ribs), Sate Taichan (plain Satay with chili sauce), Sayur Asem (sour soup), Ayam geprek (chicken with oil & cuts of chilis above), Bakwan Jagung (corn flour fried). The price is little expensive (But sometimes there is promo with any payment like traveloka, etc). Sate taichan, ayam geprek & bakwan jagung is good. Sayur asem also good (rather sweet), but Iga bakar is standard (too sweet because of soy sauce).

Il mare is located on lower Ground level (1 level under the lobby level) of Hotel Mulia Senayan.
 
 We went there to try the dining promo; La Famiglia Fiesta.
 The promo was:
 Choose any 3 Dishes for IDR 400++
 Choose any 4 Dishes for IDR 500++
 Choose any 6 Dishes for IDR 800++
 Excluding beverages.
 
 So if you choose 7 dishes, the bill will be:
 1 family courses 3 +1 family courses 4
 Etc...
 
 The promo was rather tempting & the menu had many kind of dishes to choose from.
 
 We ordered:
 Fritto Misto
 Deep fried Squid, Baby Fish & Vegetables Garlic Arrabbiata and Tartar Sauce.
 The squid was nice and tender. The baby fish was not as crunchy as it's supposed to be and a bit fishy. My son didn't like it because he could feel the tiny bones.
 The tartar sauce was delicious, but the portion was too little in comparison of the size of the fritters.
 
 Cotoletta di Manzo alla Parmigiana
 Beef Tenderloin Parmigiana", Spaghetti Pomodoro
 The beef was covered in breadcrumbs and deep fried. It's tender. Then the tomato sauce and cheese were heated up, torched and poured over the beef.
 The spaghetti pomodoro was fresh and tasty.
 
 Fusilli ai Quattro Formaggi
 Fusilli Pasta with Four Cheese Sauce.
 It's creamy, cheesy and delicious. A combination of saltiness from the cheese and sweetness from the caramelized walnuts on top. There's some spinach, too.
 
 Bucatini alla "Cacio Pepe" con Guanciale o Cecina
 Bucatini, Pecorino Cheese, Black Pepper Pork "'Guanciale" Or smoked Beef Bacon
 The Bucatini was cooked al dente, and the pork guanciale was super flavorful.
 
 Pizza al Salmone, Porro e Ricotta
 Smoked Salmon, Leek, Ricotta Cheese Roasted Almonds, Baby Spinach
 We was disappointed with the pizza. The salmon was not smoky enough. In fact, it tasted like salmon instead of smoked salmon. The pizza base was too ordinary for a hotel standard restaurant. The pizza was tasteless, underseasoned.
 
 Tiramisù Family Style
 Espresso-dipped Lady Fingers Mascarpone Cream.
 The cream & Mascarpone cheese were light and creamy. Tasted so good! Kiddos love it, too!
 
 & Kiwi juice
 
 Room for improvements
 - for a 5 star hotel standard restaurant, it's a basic requirement (in my opinion) to have hand made pasta.
 - for the pizza dough, even a small pizza joint, sometimes has sourdough pizza base. The pizza base was too ordinary, in terms of texture & taste.
 
 For the price, we reckoned it's reasonable because of the promo. But for a 5 star hotel restaurant, we're expecting a higher standard than the usual Italian restaurant.
 
 The service was great. Friendly and attentive but non disruptive 
 The waitress also gave very good food recommendations.

Visited Shibasaki at Plaza Senayan and had a pretty enjoyable overall experience. The Shio Niboshi Ramen was the highlight — the broth has a deep, savory character with that clean seafood note that makes it stand out from more standard ramen bowls. The noodles were perfectly springy and cooked just right. The only drawback was the duck meat; it was a bit tough and didn’t quite match the otherwise smooth, rich texture of the dish.
 
 We also ordered the Curry Cheese Okonomiyaki. The flavor combination was actually quite comforting — the curry and cheese work surprisingly well together — but the texture didn’t hold up. The okonomiyaki tended to fall apart and disintegrate when picked up, so you lose that satisfying bite you expect from the dish.
 
 For dessert, we tried the Basque cheesecake. The texture was nice and the portion generous, but the sweetness was a little too strong for my taste. I prefer cheesecake that leans creamier and less sugary.
 
 Overall, it’s a cozy spot with interesting flavors and a fun atmosphere. Still worth checking out if you’re in Plaza Senayan and want something a little different from typical Japanese comfort food.

It’s an ideal escape from the city’s hustle, providing a chic, resort-like atmosphere perfect for special dates or relaxing afternoon drinks overlooking the manicured grounds. While known for its extensive wine selection and cocktails, the food menu holds its own, with high-quality contemporary dishes. The service is polished, though sometimes a touch slow. It's truly a distinguished spot for those seeking an elevated social experience.

金木 / jin mu in English means Golden Wood is a Chinese food restaurant that has several branch in Pantai Indah Kapuk, Pluit Village, and Lippo Mal Puri. Me and my family visited Jin Mu at Lippo Mal Puri. The restaurant is tidy, clean, and comfortable to stay in a longer time and having a quality time with your loved one. The service here is good and friendly. Jin Mu serves a lot of Chinese food variant, such as dumpling, xiao long bao, noodle, rice, main dish with pork, chicken, beef, fish, seafood, vegetables, and many more.
 
 Here are what we tried :
 
 蛋酥花枝 / dan su hua zhi / Crispy Fried Squid Coated with Jala Sauce (IDR 65,000)
 Crispy fried squid with sweet and savory mayonnaise sauce served on a yellow cripsy in a nest shaped. Tastes good and believe me, one is not enough 
 
 鸡肉炒米粉 / ji rou chao mi fen / Stir Fried Beehon with Shredded Chicken (IDR 55,000)
 Fried thick and chewy corn beehon with chicken, fried egg, vegetables.
 
 香菇菠菜红烧豆腐 / xiang gu bo cai hong shao dou fu / Braised Chefmade Beancurd with Shimeji and Horenzo Spinach (IDR 65,000)
 This is a MUST dish that my family loves, so that we always have this wherever we come to a Chinese food restaurant that serves this menu. Six pieces of thick and soft beancurd with shimeji mushroom and spinach.
 
 猪肉炸酱面 / zhu rou zha jiang mian / Noodle served with Minced Pork with Zhajiang Sauce in Chicken Broth (IDR 29,000)
 What a good deal! We could get the promo for Zhajiang Noodle in this visit from IDR 49,000 became IDR 29,000. We could choose the topping, such as pork and chicken. We chose pork. A bowl of long and thick hand-pulled noodle served with minced pork in savory Zhajiang sauce, boiled egg, vegetables, along with the broth. Tastes good and recommended!
 
 韭菜猪肉水饺 / jiu cai zhu rou shui jiao / Boiled Dumpling filled with Minced Pork and Chives (IDR 55,000)
 At Jin Mu, there are fried dumpling, boiled dumpling, xiao long bao with the variant of filling, such as pork, chicken, brassica rapa, chives, cabbages, celery, and many more. We chose boiled dumpling filled with pork and chives to make it more delicious. Eat it directly as it is still hot for a great "dumpling experience" 
 
 Steam Hongkong (IDR 315,000 for 7 ounces)
 For this steam Hongkong mackerel fish costs IDR 45,000/gram. We ordered 7 ounces fish and got two fishes. The fish meat is so soft. Tastes good along with the broth. My grandma and her sister also like it.

The choices for an all-you-can-eat Christmas Sunday brunch may not be the most varied you will find in town, but the food tasted on point. Impressive flavors. The Peking duck was my favorite. The skin was crispy, meet was tender, accompanied by their perfect plum sauce.
 
 Other mains dishes, including salmon en croute, beef brisket, seafood on ice, sashimi, and tepanyaki, were equally delightful. I throughly enjoyed the buffet as they keep refelling these mains whenever they were empty.
 
 The traditional desserts were amazing, but in terms of Western desserts, there is room for improvement.
 
 All in all, it was a very well executed brunch.

북자카르타에 위치한 중식 해산물 요리 전문식당. 식당으로 가다보면 주변 분위기는 "이런 곳에 식당이 있을까?" 싶을 정도이지만, 음식맛은 기대이상인 곳. 입구에 들어가면 큰 벽면 수족관이 인상적이며 2층으로 올라가면 룸도 마련되어 있음. 메뉴가 매우 다양하며, 주문한 것은 소고기볶음밥, 새우 튀김, 팔보채(?), 오징어구이, 공심채볶음, 빈땅 맥주 등이다. 매우 준수한 맛을 보여주며 특히, 소고기 볶음밥과 새우 튀김이 별미다. 가격도 4인기준 맥주 5병 포함 9만원 정도인데 자카르타 로컬 식당 보다는 비싸지만 꽤 만족스럽다. 추천합니다.

Saya datang ke sini coba Soto Paru. Dan sotonya enak! Isian parunya juga banyak bangeeeettttt. Walaupun teksturnya agak hit and miss. Beberapa bagian lembut empuk, sebagian renyah garing (kesukaan saya ini), ada juga yg alot walaupun bukan di potongan yg ketekuk. Kuahnya ga terlalu creamy dan kurang kental. Tapi setelah didandanin pake kecap, nipis, dan sambel rasanya enak. Gurih dan bumbu2 semua berasa.
 
 Empingnya dikit banget tapi untung emping tambahannya harganya murah, 3000 perak doang. Porsi nasi agak sedikit menurut saya. Tapi kenyang juga karena isian parunya melimpah. Potongan kentangnya juga kegedean menurut saya rentan bat kelolodan ini kita wqwqwq.
 
 Pelayanan ramah, walaupun rame semuanya tanggap ga ada yg judes dan manyun.
 
 Cuma emang yg agak disayangkan banyak bet pengamen padahal gue makan ga lama loh, beneran duduk (ga ngantri pulak), pesenan dateng paling selang Lima menit, makan dan pulang total 20 menit kali. Pengamennya ada 3. Lo bayangin dah tu wqwqwq satu pengamen nyanyi 2-3 lagu, keliling minta duit, pengamen pertama pergi masih di depan warung udah ada yang JRENG lagi berikutnya begitu juga kejadian ketiga yaawlaaaaaa ini jangan2 yg ngamen pada ngantri nunggu giliran maen ya hahahaha.
 
 Anyway, akan balik lagi sih karena isian parunya itu lho banyak banget dengan harga 25 rebu mah masih murah lah. Lanjutkan Bang!

Sehabis Les di Sparks mampir ke Rumah Makan Mang Engking dekat UI ini. Suasana nya asri banget. Banyak lesehannya. Lesehan seperti balong ada ikan dibawah nya. Bisa kasih makan ikan juga. Makanan nya enak2 juga. Kenyang abis makan bisa ko rebahan dulu, anak2 bisanmain ayunan, prosotan, terapi ikan juga ada. Og ya kolam renang nya juga ada. Lengkap pisan euyyy.

Lokasi Gubug Makan Mang Engking ini berada di kawasan Universitas Indonesia, tapi lebih dekat dengan halte bus Transjakarta UI (hanya sekitar 500 m) jadi masih mudah diakses dengan transportasi umum.
 Restoran luas dan tergolong adem (saya datang di tengah hari saat matahari cukup terik) dengan sirkulasi udara baik. Tempat makan berada di sekeliling kolam ikan dengan air mancur, ada pilihan tempat duduk di kursi atau lesehan di area saung. Tempat cuci tangan tersedia cukup banyak di sekitar area makan, jadi tidak perlu ke toilet untuk cuci tangan saja. Sayangnya, yg saya lihat saluran pembuangannya langsung ke kolam ikan, jadi jika cuci tangan dengan sabun ikut masuk ke kolam juga. Mungkin bisa diganti sabun cucinya dengan yg organik agar tidak meracuni ikan di kolam ya.
 
 Pilihan menu makanan dan minuman cukup beragam, proses masak memang agak lama tapi masih dalam batas wajar dan pesanan dihidangkan hampir bersamaan (tidak ada yg tertinggal jauh belakangan). Kami datang hanya berdua, menu yg kami coba:
 
 - Gurame Goreng Terbang
 Sesuai harapan keringnya pas, dimarinasi dengan baik juga sehingga bagian sirip & ekornya yg crispy ada rasa asin gurih tidak hambar. Daging ikannya masih juicy dan tidak bau tanah. Puas banget!
 
 - Udang Bakar Madu (Udang Super)
 Buat penggemar udang ini juara sih, bumbunya manis asin dengan sedikit pedas, aroma bakaran cukup terasa tapi tidak sampai udangnya jadi kering apalagi gosong. Daging udangnya masih manis & juicy (berarti fresh), apalagi karena pilih yg udang super jadi besar2.
 
 - Tumis Kangkung
 Proses masaknya pas sehingga kangkung ada di kematangan yg tepat, tidak alot tapi masih “kres” ketika dikunyah. Hanya untuk saya terlalu berminyak jadi kuahnya tidak kemakan padahal biasanya kuah dari percampuran sari2 kangkung dan bumbu itu enak dicampur ke nasi.
 
 - Sayur Asem
 Tipe sayur asem kuah bening dan tidak terlalu asam, isi sayuran sebanding dengan kuahnya. Rasanya light dan segar, bagi yang suka pedas lebih enak ditambah sambal sedikit.
 
 - Sambal Terasi Dadak
 Di sini sambal harus beli terpisah yaa, padahal biasanya klo pesan ikan atau ayam goreng sudah dapat sambal. Sy pilih sambal terasi dadak yg katanya best seller di antara menu sambal di sini. Sambalnya enak, terasinya berasa, tapi pedasnya lumayan nampol.
 
 - Kelapa Muda Utuh
 Siang2 panas enak banget nih minum kelapa muda. Sengaja pilih yg utuh supaya bisa puas kerok kelapanya sendiri. Saat datang ternyata es batu dan gula cair disajikan terpisah, bagus nih, jadi bisa atur sendiri seberapa banyak yg mau dimasukkan. Kelapa mudanya sy request yg sedang dan yg disajikan benar sesuai harapan, dagingnya cukup tebal tapi masih lembut.
 
 Secara keseluruhan puas makan di tempat ini, untuk harga tergolong standar, sebanding dengan kualitas dan besaran porsi makanan. Karyawan cukup ramah melayani, tapi kecepatan/kesigapan perlu ditingkatkan lagi, terutama jika resto semakin ramai pengunjung. Untuk saya pribadi, toilet perlu diperbaiki/renovasi agar lebih nyaman dan bersih karena yg sy temukan tergolong kotor, dan jumlah ruangnya sedikit.

Menurut saya ayah goreng kremesnya biasa saja. Tumis kangkung biasa saja malah banyakan batang. Besok2 coba ikannya ahh. Hihihihi. Parkiran memang tak banyak jadi harus di pinggir jalan dengan jumlah kursi memang buanyak. Btw baru tahu tersedia kolam main anak. Unik juga.

Came here on a Saturday night with family.
 
 We ordered:
 • Paket Mini (Lenjer, Pempek Selam, Bulat, Kulit – smaller size)
 • Tekwan
 • Lenggang Panggang
 • Mie Laksan
 • Es Cendol
 • Es Kacang Merah
 
 The Tekwan was the most memorable — the broth was really enjoyable. The pempek itself was flavorful and enjoyable, but honestly the real highlight was the cuko (pedas); without it, the pempek would feel quite bland.
 The Mie Laksan was just okay for me — nothing memorable, and probably something I wouldn’t order again.
 
 Portions were just right, and prices were reasonable (quite cheap for full-fish pempek).
 
 Location: Easy to find
 
 Parking: Limited, but there’s a parking attendant who will redirect you to the next building.
 
 Tips / Recommendations
 Order everything in one go — if you add another dish later, it takes a while to come out.
 
 Overall Impression
 Would I come back? Yes!

From sizzling BBQ to hearty stews, every bite takes you straight to Korea. Don’t miss their mouthwatering bossam and refreshing makgeolli, a perfect combo for any food lover. 밑반찬으로 두부부침이 나옵니다.
 김치 맛있습니다.
 비빔밥에 제공되는 미니 된장찌개도 맛있습니다.
 두부를 만드는곳이라서 그런지 두부가 무척 풍성하게 들어있습니다.
 
 콩국수..양은 넉넉하고 꾸덕함도 딱 좋았는데.. 고소함을 느낄수가 없었습니다. 독일에서 슈퍼에서 파는 Bio 두부랑 두유랑 갈아먹는것보다도 고소함이 느껴지지않아서 무척 실망했습니다.
 
 꼬막비빔밥.. 메뉴에 넣으시기전에 한국에서 꼬막 비빔밥을 한번이라도 드셔보시고 만든건지..의문이들 정도입니다.
 정말 심각합니다. 첫입먹고 이거 상한거 아닌가?하는 생각이들 만큼 양념맛이 아주 심각합니다.
 메뉴를 계속 유지하실 생각이라면 엄청난 개선이 필요합니다.
 
 순두부찌개..다른 곳보다 순두부자체는 양도 넉넉하고 부들부들하지만..국물을 진한맛이없고 그것을 짠맛으로 대체한것 같습니다.순두부국이라고 하는게 더 맞을듯합니다.
 
 직원분들 서비스는 훌륭합니다.친절하고 신속한 서비스를 받을수있습니다.

Honu Kemang is a great spot if you’re craving poke bowls with a fresh and healthy twist. The ingredients taste clean and well-prepared, with generous portions of salmon and tuna, paired with rice and toppings that balance flavor and texture nicely. The menu isn’t overly complicated, which makes it easy to choose, and everything feels consistent in quality. The interior has a relaxed, minimalist vibe that fits perfectly with Kemang’s atmosphere, making it a comfortable place to hang out for lunch or dinner. Service is straightforward and efficient, and the pricing feels fair for the quality you get. Overall, it’s one of the more reliable casual dining options in the area.

 4. Chocolate matcha: Didn't expect it to be this good. The chocolate didn't over power the matcha.

Pertama ke cafe ini nyobain ruang indoornya. Tempat duduk ok, ruang ber-ac, ada stop kontak, ada rak berisi buku. Koleksi buku nya beberapa tentang garden landscape, filsafat, dan novel karya pengarang luar negeri.
 
 Kedua kali kesini, singgah dulu sebelum masuk tol di malam minggu. Tempat parkir mobil sangat terbatas dan sempit, tapi ada satpam yang sigap membantu parkir mobil. Kali ini saya mencoba makan di area outdoor, ternyata bagian atas sudah ditutupi kanopi, sehingga kalau hujan, tidak perlu khawatir. Penataan taman sedemikian rupa sehingga saya tidak menyadari sebelumnya bahwa ada kanopi. Selain kanopi di ruangan outdoor juga ada kipas angin.
 
 Musola laki-laki dan perempuan terpisah, tempat wudu laki² agak ngumpet menurut saya, jadi agak bingung.
 
 Yang bisa ditingkatkan dari tempat ini adalah pelayanannya. Saya datang dan duduk hingga 10 menit, tidak ada yang mengantarkan menu. Akhirnya saya ambil sendiri. Kalau ada yang standby dan memperhatikan tamu akan memberikan kesan pelayanan yang lebih baik, setidaknya bagi saya.
 
 Sambil menunggu pesanan, kami disuguhkan dengan minuman hangat, saya lupa itu beras kencur atau jahe.

Chuan Xiang Pavilion is an absolute gem for anyone who loves authentic Sichuan cuisine. The flavors are bold, aromatic, and perfectly balanced, with just the right level of spice to keep you coming back for more. Every dish is beautifully presented and generously portioned, from the fragrant hotpot to the mouthwatering stir-fried specialties. The staff are attentive, friendly, and happy to offer recommendations, making the dining experience both warm and welcoming. The cozy yet elegant ambiance adds to the charm, making it ideal for both casual meals and special gatherings. If you’re looking for genuine Sichuan flavors with top-notch service, Chuan Xiang Pavilion is a must-visit.

Chuan Xiang Pavilion is a Hunan restaurant so most of the food they serve is fiery hot! Hunan food is mostly oily and spicy. This restaurant has a common dining hall at the ground level and multiple VIP rooms on the second and third levels.
 
 The food here is good. They can adjust how hot the food can be and the service is pretty efficient.

A good restaurant for those who fancy a break from the routine Chinese Indonesian, Cantonese and Hokkien cuisine. They serve a mixture of Hunan & Sichuan stuff, whose value for money is actually quite good. It's also possible to adjust the spice level and the ordering experience itself can be done entirely via online. Expats from China are frequent visitors here. My only complaint is that many customers love to smoke indoor and the place doesn't seem to be aired properly, though the overall hygiene is still quite good. Finally, it would be great if you can speak some Mandarin because the Indonesian staff can't really explain the food/ingredients well.

Came here for lunch and was very satisfied with their consistent quality since many decades ago.
 
 This time I had Nasi goreng Kambing and Mee Goreng Kambing. They were sensational! With that unique smokey flavour from the right high temperature during cooking in the wok, each grain of the rice was packed of flavours. Unlike the Local Arabic influenced or Acehnese Nasi Goreng which were packed with spice blends, their Nasi goreng and mee goreng were super light in spices, almost like Chinese style but still retain the unique flavour and highlighting the succulent flavourful pieces of the mutton.
 
 Teh Tarik here was on the lighter side but using high quality aromatic black tea powder, almost resembling Assamese-Mamri tea flavour. Very interesting. And they have a tiny sprinkling of cinnamon powder on top, that gives a normal teh tarik a complete different nuance, which can be omitted if prefered.

Had a fantastic experience dining at this Manado restaurant. The dishes were rich, spicy, and full of authentic North Sulawesi flavour — from the rica-rica to the ikan woku, everything tasted homemade and deeply satisfying. The sambal was perfectly balanced, and you can really tell the ingredients are fresh.
 
 The staff were friendly and welcoming, always happy to explain the dishes and make recommendations. The atmosphere felt cozy yet vibrant — perfect for both casual meals and sharing with friends.
 
 Highly recommended for anyone craving genuine Manado cuisine in Jakarta! I’ll definitely be coming back to try more dishes.

 Makanan: Katsukita menghadirkan cita rasa Jepang modern dengan sentuhan khas yang menggugah selera. Aneka menu nasi disajikan dengan tampilan rapi dan rasa yang memuaskan gurih, lembut, dan kaya tekstur. Pilihan makanan pendamping seperti gyoza, edamame, dan tofu juga patut dicoba; porsinya pas dan terasa autentik. Setiap hidangan terasa disiapkan dengan perhatian pada detail, menjadikannya pengalaman makan yang menyenangkan.
 
 Harga: kisaran ±Rp 150.000/orang.
 
 Tempat: Desain interiornya sederhana dan bersih, memanfaatkan ruang dengan ceiling rendah namun tetap memberikan suasana yang nyaman dan hangat. Cocok untuk makan santai bersama teman atau keluarga tanpa kesan berlebihan.
 
 Pelayanan: Pelayan ramah, sigap, dan komunikatif. Proses pemesanan dan penyajian juga tergolong cepat.
 
 Kesimpulan: bintang 5 untuk makanan.

The upfront note this restaurant is a non halal offering, so those seeking halal options should consider other establishments.
 
 Now, let's talk about the broth, the very soul of any respectable shabu shabu. Here, it achieved a near perfect equilibrium. The savoriness was present, impactful even, yet it refrained from overpowering the palate. A foundational warmth, undeniably satisfying.
 
 Moving to the components, the pork meatballs demanded attention. The texture was a delightful interplay of springiness giving way to a tender interior. The pork flavor itself was genuine, not aggressive but providing a distinct and interesting layer of taste.
 
 The dumplings also impressed. The filling was substantial, delivering a pleasing savory punch. The wrapper, commendable in its construction, possessed the structural integrity to contain the filling without being excessively thick or doughy.
 Overall, the shabu shabu experience at Fairy Garden Mangga Besar proved quite gratifying. The well balanced broth, the expertly crafted pork meatballs and dumplings, alongside the evident freshness of the other ingredients, coalesced to create a dish that was both comforting and genuinely satisfying. For enthusiasts of non halal shabu shabu, this spot warrants a visit.

Highlights: Friendly staff with exceptional professionalism that provides personal attention, good ambience that combines indoor with a nice place to sit outside, and away from the noise. Ideal for decompressing and talking business if needed.
 
 Why this restaurant.
 I came to breakfast every day, and lunch/dinner almost everyday. The first reason is because of the incredibly attentive, kind, and courteous staff. They always provide a professional and personal service. Mr. Yanggi, Steffie, Mr. Jefta, Angga, Syalsa, Vaszira, Ms. Nessya, and many more - has always welcomed me with a smile. The head chef is always so very kind and greets me with a smile. There are many more – but I don’t remember their names at this time. I have never met a an employee here that was not friendly. I appreciate these small touches of customer service that enables me to have a good customer experience. I have been to many restaurants/hotels/business class flights with so many hard-working professionals. The differentiator here is that I can go to a very professional establishment - but if I don’t feel welcome, I would prefer not to go there again. However, for this restaurant, the professionalism is exceptional, and I feel welcomed which is why I look forward to coming here daily.
 
 Breakfast
 Breakfast is second reason why I frequent to this establishment. The food is good, fresh, and the variety of choices is very good. I understand this is rated a 4-star hotel – but I am very surprised by how wonderful the selection and service is. I would say it is a higher level 5-star hotel restaurant quality. The egg station is staffed by competent and efficient employees. They get my order with professional efficiency and kindness. The fruit and salad bar is very good as well with many toppings available. I can tell the watermelon for example, has been freshly cut. I especially enjoy the traditional Indonesian drinks. I also noticed that some of the foods are changed the next day – which adds additional variety.
 
 I inquired about the coffee, and the head manager quickly rectified the situation and went above and beyond expected levels of customer service. Because of how fantastic the head manager was – I felt endeared to him and felt genuinely valued as a customer.
 
 Lunch
 I primarily go to lunch to your establishment so I can order a variety of different non-alcoholic drinks. I can then step outside onto the balcony and look around. I then usually order lunch which has a wide selection from various countries – from western to Asian.
 
 Ambience
 I think the ambience of the restaurant is good and comfortable. The music is perfect for an exclusive lounge / restaurant type of feel – of which I appreciate.
 
 Conclusion
 All in all, I really appreciate the restaurant. Even after all this time – I still remember eating breakfast here and meeting with the kind managers and staff. Even if there was a discrepancy – all the staff exuded top notch professionalism, friendliness, and kept the value of the customer at the top. In light of all my travels, I do believe that this is the best customer service I ever had from a restaurant. It is my hope that corporate headquarters recognize how amazing this place truly is. I say all of this as a customer who stays at a lot of 4-5 star Hiltons around the world.
Great buffet breakfast with plenty of options! Love the life cooking stations. Excellent service from Arya and Stefie, both were so friendly and attentive.

1945 at Fairmont Jakarta is where Indonesian heritage meets refined dining ✨. My go-to place to bring exec/ bosses if they want to experience a fine Indonesian dining when in town.
 
 Every dish feels like a tribute — satay plated with luxe flair, rendang rich and soulful, and classics reimagined with modern polish while staying true to their roots. It’s halal-certified too, making it perfect for both local and international guests.
 
 The ambience is elegant yet warm, with contemporary Indonesian touches that make it ideal for celebrations, business dinners, or just indulging in something special.
 
 Service is polished and attentive, matching Fairmont’s 5-star standard. 1945 isn’t just dinner — it’s Indonesia elevated to fine dining at its best .

The Indonesian food served in 1945 restaurant is refined and delicious. I especially enjoyed the Sup Buntut, Rawon, and the grilled mackerel. The Mackerel is grilled whole, moist and cooked perfectly!
 
 The keropok, which comes with a trio of sambal, is complimentary. It is the best I have tasted in Jakarta.
 
 I would also recommend the jamu jahe. The Jamu jahe is creamy and smooth. Perfect to reset the palate.
 
 We were served by Agung, who was very attentive.
 
 As an Accor plus member, you would also be eligible for discounts.

Located at Fairmont Hotel Senayan Jakarta, it's a fine dining establishment with curated Indonesian cuisine complemented by elegant setting.
 
 We booked a private room for 15 people, and we ordered kambing guling (grilled lamb), pesta bahari (seafood platter), wagyu rendang, chicken satay, sautéed water spinach (tumis kangkung) and mashed water spinach (kangkung tumbuk) which were all excellent. We had tempe nachos, lumpia bebek, bakwan jamur and jamur goreng roa for starter which were so delicious.
 
 The waiters were also very helpful.

Love everything about this place from the best beef rendang I’ve ever had, to the fantastic service from my server Agung, who had such delightful recommendations! Only downside is the dishes can be quite huge or meant for sharing, so would be better to come with a few people to share dishes all around!

Pake Promo Grab Dineout bikin hemat. Kasir sangat baik dan membantu sekali. Terimakasih Burger King dan semoga konsisten terus.

Visited on Nov 17, written on Nov 24, 2025.
 
 A franchised burger joint located on the first floor of the mall. It has it's own dining area with a hand washing sink, inside. They provide booster seats for babies. For payments, they accept cash, cards, and online e-wallet.
 
 Ordered the Royal Chicken Supreme meal, upsized. Waited for about ~8 mins. before getting them. The burger tasted great, as the fried chicken went well with the cheese and beef bacon slices. It could very well be my go-to order at the franchise. All the food and beverage are up to the franchise's standards.
 
 While tomato ketchup packs are subject to request at the counter, there's a chili sauce station right next to it. However, the sauce was a bit liquid-y, tasted and looked like it was watered down.

CASIO LEGEND DARI TAHUN 1990, SETAHUN LEBIH MUDA DARI GUA 
 
 Wah ini salah satu babi garing yg otentik banget sih ga neko-neko, ga pake fancy-fancy-an tapi tetep ada "nyawa" dan vibe nya sendiri rumah makannya.
 
 Kita Pesan:
 1. Siobak (Babi Garing) = 90k --> Ini mungkin sekitar 300-400 gr deh. Rasanya lebih ke padat dan garing ya bagian dagingnya. Jadi bagi yang suka lebih agak juicy dikit, mungkin kurang bisa memenuhi expedisi kwkwkw 'ekspektasi'. TAPI, rasanya wewwwa ga ngotak, enak woyyyy
 2. Nasi Goreng Babi = ...k ,lupa harganya. Ini Normal sih Nasgornya babinya, masih enakan jauh di Bakmi Gang Kelinci Passser Baroe. Btw, kalau mau beli Nasgor Babi disini harrus ngomong yaa. Karena dia gaada di menu. Jadi request, terus di bikinin.
 3. Nasi Hainam Ayam Rebus = 65k. Iniiiii.....iniiiii.... Iniiiiiiii ayam rebusnyaaaaa RICH BANGET RASANYAAAAAA . Lembut, light, dan after taste dan aromanya adalah minyak wijen plus kegurihan tingkat Nirwanan lantai 27 ckckckckc..... Perfection in the savory nyaa Ya Allah,... Harus cobaaaaaa.
 4. Krupuk Kulit Babi = 15k/bungkus. Ini juga enakk bangetytttyyyyy ga bisaa kata-kataaaaaaa gurih nampolZzzzzzzzz.
 5. Minumnya Esteh dan Tawar Manis Panas. Shout out buat abang yang bikin Teh nya karena integritas nya Tinggiiiii....
 
 Biasanya kan kalau di warung-warung makan lainnya, kalau kita minta Teh Panas datengnya Anget, nah kalau minta Teh Anget, datangnya dingin tuh, nah disini ngga ada kek begitu. Kalau minta panas ya panas kwkwk sampe dower bibir gua fire tapi bagusss doongg.
 
 Btw, semua pembeli disini seperti nya mereka semua adalah Return Customer. Dan sewaktu mereka berkunjung dan makan baik sendirian atau bersama keluarga, mereka terlihat sudah sangat akrab bersahabat dgn ruang-ruang makannya... Mereka duduk santai, bercanda, berlama-lama meski makanan udah abis, nyaman banget ngeliat nya. Mungkin memamg mereka dari kecil udah sering makan disini bersama keluarga juga kali ya, orang ini Legend dari 90an.
 
 Yaudah deh, itu aja Review gua, pokonya ini enak, not a skibidi one, it's an Alpha Culinary.

Saya mau review tempat ini bukan utk menjatuhkan. Tp ingin memberi masukan spy lebih baik lagi ke depannya.

 Yg pertama ingin sy sampaikan mengenai kebersihan.
 Di area luar yg dekat telaga wastafel nya jorok Krn banyak sisa makanan bekas cuci tangan para tamu membiarkan sisa2 makanan berserakan di wastafel. Harus nya, ada bagian kebersihan yg stanby utk membersihkan Krn ini bukan resto abal2. Kran nya pun ada 1 yg lepas dan ga ada yg perbaiki.
 Kedua,sy bertemu beberapa pelayan perempuan yg kurang ramah, menjawa pertanyaan sy sedikit ketus. Saat itu sy di layani pelayanan pria nama Ryan, dia cukup sigap dan ramah.
 Ada pelayan wanita yg sy minta utk lap meja sy basah bekas minuman dan tumpah makanan, dia bukan lap aja tp mau di semprot alat pembersih meja. Untung cepat sy cegah. Disini artinya kurang profesional kerjanya,Krn. Di meja ada makanan mana mungkin di lap pakai semprot an.
 Dan yg terakhir, meja saya datang duluan dr pada meja sebelah dan kami pesan duluan. Tp makanan meja sebelah keluar duluan dr pada makanan kami.
 Kami menunggu cukup lama padahal kami lebih dulu memesan.
 Kepada pihak manajemen, semoga review saya ini bisa menjadi masukan agar kedepannya pelayanan restaurant ini bisa lebih baik lagi.
 Dan saya ga akan bosan datang lagi.

Plan Do See (Shikaku) brought @shibasaki.id ramen from Chofu, Tokyo to Jakarta earlier this year. It has quite an interesting story.
 
 At 43, a former IT programmer Saburo Ishigooka resigned & founded Shibasakitei in 2011 to elevate ramen to an art form. Applying a washoku "philosophy of subtraction," he rejected MSG and heavy broths for a pure 100% katsuobushi soup. Believing "ramen is 80% appearance," his signature is a bowl of meticulously folded noodles. He builds flavor not in the soup, but by infusing the essence of duck and sardine into aromatic flavor oils, he can build flavor into the soup base. A revolutionary technique that earned his refined, beautiful ramen a Michelin Bib Gourmand in Japan.
 
 Today I managed to try their dishes in Jakarta:
 
 - Shio Niboshi Ramen
 Delicious shio (salt) soup using Niboshi (dried baby sardines) complemented with yuzu foam for a touch of brightness
 
 - Senayan Black Ramen
 Special menu created only for the Senayan store. Inspired by Toyama Black Ramen, the broth used dark soy sauce & heaps of black pepper for a peppery kick.
 
 Price was quite high, 2 bowls of ramen plus ocha costs IDR 318K, but since the dish is good and the broth is refined, I'll overlook this today.

Buat yang suka ramen kuah nya ga kentel atau bukan creamy broth ini enak banget dan tekstur mie nya bisa dibilang yang paling enak di jakarta. Kalau bisa kasih masukan duck nya bisa lebih enak kalau fat nya di render

Shoyu ramen nya light jadi buat seger di tenggorokan, mienya enak bisa di sruput dan tidak terlalu membal untuk di kunyah, juaranya sih breast duck nya yang meskipun cuma 2 potong, coba ditambah jadi 3/4 slice lebih appetizing dan kenyang. 8/10 ⭐

Pertama kali datang ke outlet yg di Senayan city, beberapa hal yg mau aku sharing plus guidence buat yg berencana mau kesini.
 
 Plusnya :
 1. Welcoming guest, stafnya ramah dan kalian akan ditanya berapa utk pax, lgsg diarahkan ke meja.
 2. Diatas meja sudah ada selembar kertas menu dan buku menu, kita tinggal centang menu apa saja yg akan kita order memakai pensil.
 3. Penyajian cepat sekali meskipun pas saya datang agak sedikit ramai. Platingannya cantik.
 4. Utk soup aku pesan yg mala dan chicken collagen. Malanya enak, collagennya jg enak, tp better di campur biar lebih nyaman di mulut. Pesen pangsit udang juga yg sepertinya fresh bgt baru dibikin. Over all semua menu disajikan secara fresh, terlihat dari sayurannya juga.
 5. Pesen es teh reffil yah, ditanyakan jg oleh servernya mau tambah es batu atau hanya dingin saja.
 6. Btw tempatnya nyaman, dingin meskipun sedang menikmati hotpot.
 
 Nahhh sekarang minusnya buat perbaikan lebih baik yah.
 1. Untuk org yg pertama kali datang kesini, tidak ada ditanyakan apakah sudah makan disini sebelumnya? Sehingga customer bisa diarahkan oleh servernya.
 2. Tidak ditawarkan menu favorite, misal soup mostly fav yg dipesen sm banyak customer, atau varian paste dan daging yg menjadi kelebihan dr resto ini.
 4. Tidak di informasikan ada stand khusus buat per dippingan sauce, krn posisi pertama kali ke store ini dan tempat duduk saya terhalang dengan pilar.
 5. Tidak ditawarkan menu dessert ketika hampir selesai makan.
 6. Tidak diarahkan untuk cara mengecilkan kompor.
 
 Over all, suka dengan makanan dan pelayanannya, tapi tolong di tingkatkan lg service nya.
 
 Thank you ❤️

Makan di sini bersama keluarga sangat memuaskan! Tempatnya nyaman dan pilihan makanannya melimpah. Kami suka semua makanan yang kami coba.
 Ada dua model makan: buffet dan hidangan spesial yang diantar langsung ke meja. Tips: Kalau ada hidangan yang ditawarkan ke meja, langsung ambil saja! Kesempatan itu belum tentu datang dua kali.
 Catatan penting: Restoran ini tidak 100% halal karena ada menu B2. Bagi yang tidak bisa mentolerir campuran (halal dan non-halal), lebih baik dihindari. Tapi kalau bisa toleransi, wajib coba! Pastikan ambil yang seafood, ayam, dan sapi mereka.
 Ada juga kue es krim tinggi ber-rum (mengandung alkohol) yang enak banget, tapi jangan berikan ke anak-anak ya.
 Pelayanan juga luar biasa! Terima kasih banyak untuk Tia, Aidha, Lisa, dan Arif yang sudah melayani dengan sepenuh hati. Sampai jumpa lagi!

북자카르타에 위치한 중식 해산물 요리 전문식당. 식당으로 가다보면 주변 분위기는 "이런 곳에 식당이 있을까?" 싶을 정도이지만, 음식맛은 기대이상인 곳. 입구에 들어가면 큰 벽면 수족관이 인상적이며 2층으로 올라가면 룸도 마련되어 있음. 메뉴가 매우 다양하며, 주문한 것은 소고기볶음밥, 새우 튀김, 팔보채(?), 오징어구이, 공심채볶음, 빈땅 맥주 등이다. 매우 준수한 맛을 보여주며 특히, 소고기 볶음밥과 새우 튀김이 별미다. 가격도 4인기준 맥주 5병 포함 9만원 정도인데 자카르타 로컬 식당 보다는 비싸지만 꽤 만족스럽다. 추천합니다.

Sun Nong Dak in PIK really does remind me of the Sun Nong Dan I had in LA. The galbi-jjim comes bubbling hot and gets blasted with a blowtorch tableside, which melts all that cheese into a rich, gooey blanket over the short ribs. It’s fiery, fun, and super satisfying. The flavor is bold and comforting, and while the beef isn’t US prime quality, it still hits the spot.
 
 I added ramyeon into the mix and loved how the noodles soaked up that spicy, savory sauce. The chicken wings were another highlight with crispy skin and a sweet-spicy glaze that kept me reaching for more. The japchae was just OK and not really memorable, and that’s okay because the main event here is the galbi-jjim.
 
 The whole thing felt even better with the 50% promo they were running, which made it a steal for the experience and the portions. If you come, just go straight for the galbi-jjim with cheese, add ramyeon and wings, and maybe a pajeon if you want something more.
 
 It’s a spot for when you want big flavors, a little fun at the table, and a taste of that LA experience right here in Jakarta.

I was curious with this resto, since their ads often popped up ad socmed. We were group of 5 adults, 2 teenagers, 2 kids, bought 2 voucher worth @Rp 599rb for galbijim and pajeon package.. and there were plenty foods (should have just redeemed 1 and order other food haha) .
 Well, it's not exactly Sun Nong Dan (LA resto, just like the ads said), it's Sun Nong Dak hahah, however, it was definitely much cheaper, and the taste was more suitable to Indonesia/asian's taste.

I can safely say this place serves the best barbeque pork ribs in all of Jakarta and for a bargain of a price. Their other dishes like steak and sausages are also on par, plus they're super generous with the fries they give in all their dishes. One other thing to highlight is you can bring your own drink and they will keep it for you until you're ready. And on top of all that, the hospitality is just amazing. The servers are attentive, warm-hearted, and they're quick on their feet. Wait time is minimal and they are always ready to fulfill all your needs. However, parking is quite hard to find as spots are limited. They do however, have a designated valet area, so that shouldn't be much of an issue. I've been coming back for a while now and they deserve all five of my stars. Keep on going Howdy's!

Very nice place with good food. Super recommended for family gathering.

Came here for dinner on weekday, resto quite empty so we managed to get a table.
 We ordered Ayam Goreng Bawang Putih, Gurame Terbang, Angsio Tahu Pocai Jamur for the main course. And we chose Sup Kepiting Asparagus for the soup.
 For Dim Sum items we ordered Crispy Shrimp Ball, Lumpia Goreng Kulit Tahu, Siomay Udang Ayam, and Kaki Ayam. And Pudding Kopi for dessert.
 Highlighted dishes from what we ordered were: Ayam Goreng Bawang Putih was so good. Must try when you come here. The fried chicken was succulent and juicy, marinated well coz it’s so tasty. And the fried garlic was nice and the skin was so crispy. The Crispy Shrimp Ball was good too, crispy skin outside and nice filling inside.
 Siomay Udang Ayam was tasty and generous chunk of chicken meat and the shrimp.
 Sup Jagung Kepiting was so nice and flavourful, recommended.
 On the other day we came visit again to have family dinner, this time we had Ayam Goreng Bawang Putih, Ayam Goreng Terapi, Guo Tie Babi Pakchoy, Gurame Goreng Tahu Tausi, Telur Caipo, Sapi Cah Cabe Hijau, Babi Buncis Ayam Szechuan, Crispy Shrimp Ball, Nasi Goreng Yang Zhou, Lamian Goreng Seafood.
 All the food we ordered were great, it was so delicious and flavourful.
 Highlighted dishes from our second visit were: Ayam Goreng Bawang Putih and the Crispy Shrimp Ball (we always ordered these when we eat here), Gurame Goreng Tahu Tausi, and Ayam Goreng Terapi.

 Highly recommended.

Even the Guo Tie and Sui Kiao was amazing. Both were cooked to perfection. The place was also very well organized and clean. The restaurant has one of the best services I've ever seen. The waiters and waitresses were very friendly, responsive and full of joy. However, I believe the price of the food was slightly overpriced for the side dishes. For the main dishes, the price was quite worth it for this quality of food. I personally would go back here again with my friends or family in the future.

Chuan Xiang Pavilion is an absolute gem for anyone who loves authentic Sichuan cuisine. The flavors are bold, aromatic, and perfectly balanced, with just the right level of spice to keep you coming back for more. Every dish is beautifully presented and generously portioned, from the fragrant hotpot to the mouthwatering stir-fried specialties. The staff are attentive, friendly, and happy to offer recommendations, making the dining experience both warm and welcoming. The cozy yet elegant ambiance adds to the charm, making it ideal for both casual meals and special gatherings. If you’re looking for genuine Sichuan flavors with top-notch service, Chuan Xiang Pavilion is a must-visit.

Chuan Xiang Pavilion is a Hunan restaurant so most of the food they serve is fiery hot! Hunan food is mostly oily and spicy. This restaurant has a common dining hall at the ground level and multiple VIP rooms on the second and third levels.
 
 The food here is good. They can adjust how hot the food can be and the service is pretty efficient.

A good restaurant for those who fancy a break from the routine Chinese Indonesian, Cantonese and Hokkien cuisine. They serve a mixture of Hunan & Sichuan stuff, whose value for money is actually quite good. It's also possible to adjust the spice level and the ordering experience itself can be done entirely via online. Expats from China are frequent visitors here. My only complaint is that many customers love to smoke indoor and the place doesn't seem to be aired properly, though the overall hygiene is still quite good. Finally, it would be great if you can speak some Mandarin because the Indonesian staff can't really explain the food/ingredients well.

Kategori: Restoran Tematik
 
 Makanan: Japanese teppanyaki, live cooking. 1 set menu teppanyaki sudah termasuk sayuran, seafood ( biasanya cumi dan udang), daging (ayam/sapi/ikan salmon) dan penutup dengan nasi goreng. Salah satu resto teppanyaki favorit saya di Jakarta dan rasa tiap koki pasti berbeda-beda sesuai dengan permintaan.
 
 Pelayanan: Pemesanana tidak terlalu lama, dan penyajian makanan kadang disuguhi dengan atraksi kebolehan dari chef itu sendiri yang kadang melakukan atraksi akrobatik makanan dan atraksi api..
 
 Harga: kisaran ±Rp 250.000/orang,
 
 Tempat: Bertemakan nuansa jepang dengan kompor di depan para pengunjung. Tempat ini pertama kali dibuka sejak tahun 2010. Dan sedikit catatan mungkin tempat ini agak berminyak karena pertunjukan api sering membuat tempat ini terkena cipratan minyak.
 
 Kesimpulan: Bintang 5 untuk makanan dan pelayanan.
Food was great and the services too. Free dessert too unlike other Maison Tatsuta resto.

The chefs are very skillful. They can do many tricks. One thing that impresses me is that they can toss the knives around without dropping them. They are also very funny and entertaining. One time in the table beside mine, the chef put a dancing toy chicken and made the rice and egg into a heart shape. Their teppanyaki is the best part. You can get imported 125 gram piece of wagyu for about 390k idr which is a pretty good price. While cooking, the smell of the butter is very nice and makes me even more hungry. Their tofu tastes very good and buttery. With a set, you get salty, warm and comforting miso soup with tofu and veggies. If you love butter on your food, you should come eat here.

Buffet resto di hotel pullman ini memang ngga sebesar buffet di hotel berbintang lainnya, tapi saya suka karena jarak antara meja tamu dengan food section cukup dekat. Makan jadi lebih santai dan antrian pun masih wajar. Pelayanannya juga bagus, staff ramah dan gesit.
 
 Menu cukup variatif, ada pasta, makanan indonesia, makanan india, makanan jepang, dimsum,
 seafood, juga dessert. Untuk rasa, ada yang enak, juga ada yang biasa saja.
 
 Saya paling suka di salad section, banyak pilihan salad yang sudah pakai dressing. Beef saladnya enak, cocok di santap bareng sambal matah yang ada di food section makanan indonesia hehe maklum, doyan pedas.
 
 Salad juga ada di area dekat seafood, lengkap dengan potongan pastrami dan bologna, ini juga enak. Seafoodnya juga fresh, terutama udangnya.
 
 Dari noodles section, saya coba kuah tom yum memakai mie warna warni dan sayuran. Enak, kuahnya segar, sambalnya juga pedas.
 
 Untuk pasta, cukup enak tapi ngga istimewa. Taburan keju cukup banyak untuk menu carbonara, tapi sayang pastanya sendiri kurang cheesy.
 
 Untuk sushi, saya suka banget karena kebanyakan spicy suhsi, sesuai selera. Ukuran juga pas dan isiannya cukup enak. Sementara salmon sashimi kurang segar, bisa di lihat dari warnanya pada foto saya.
 
 Dessert yang di pajang cukup variatif, mulai dari cake, buah, sampai chocolate fondue. Saya sendiri ambil beberapa mini cake, untuk rasa cukup enak. Teman saya malah ketagihan sama crepes lembut dan ice creamnya.

Makanannya enak bangett, pelayanannya cepat dan tempatnya juga cozy banget. Bukan cmn makanannya yg enak tapi pelayanannya juga luar biasa. [] Indonesia
 
 Paradise Dynasty Jakarta
 
 Paradise Dynasty na adresi Letjen S. Parman br. 28 u zapadnom Jakarti spada među najposećenije kineske restorane u gradu zahvaljujući inovativnim jelima i luksuznoj atmosferi. Mnoge recenzije hvale "heavenly" xiao long bao s bogatim nadevom od svinjske masti, a cena je opravdana kvalitetom i količinom. Ambijent odiše elegancijom carskih dvora – drveni paneli stare više od sto godina stvaraju toplu i sofisticiranu atmosferu. U uslužnom smislu, osoblje je opisano kao veoma ljubazno i profesionalno, a usluga brza i diskretna. Posebno se ističe svinjski gurmanski rez – pork belly – koji mnogi smatraju jednim od najboljih u jugoistočnoj Aziji.
 
 Meni nudi i autentične la mian rezance, bogate supom od svinjskih kostiju, koja je odličnog ukusa i teksture. Bao buns i spring rolls dobijaju pohvale za hrskavost i sočnost nadeva. Vegetarijanske i začinjene varijante knedli često se navode kao odličan izbor za one koji izbegavaju meso. Konzistentnost ukusa i teksture u različitim lokacijama brenda potvrđuje da je Paradise Dynasty sinonim za pouzdan kvalitet.
 
 Restoran redovno sprovodi akcije poput "buy 1 get 1" za dim sum, što dodatno privlači goste u radnim danima. Neki povremeni negativni komentari pominju sporiju uslugu tokom večeri, ali i to se često nadoknadi besprekornim ukusom hrane. Interijer je prostran, čist i ugodan, sa mogućnošću izbora standardnog ili VIP smeštaja. Mnogi posetioci vole fotografisanje hrane, jer je prezentacija pažljivo osmišljena i vizuelno privlačna.
 
 Poznato je da restoran pripada renomiranoj Paradise Group Holdings, međunarodnom lancu otvorenom 2002. u Singapuru, što mu daje kredibilitet brenda. Blizina velikih tržnih centara kao što su Central Park i Neo SOHO čini ga idealnim izborom za pauzu nakon kupovine. Moguće je kombinovati posetu restoranu s obilaskom unutrašnjih atrakcija kao što su Jakarta Aquarium i Taman Anggrek Mall. U nastavku je još nekoliko razloga zbog kojih ga vredi posetiti:
 
 Turistički interes:
 - Degustacija sveta prvih osam ukusa xiao long baoa pruža jedinstveni gastronomski doživljaj.
 - Restoran je pogodan za porodične posete, jer nudi i prilagođene menije za decu i akcije za više osoba.
 - Blizina Grogol železničke stanice čini pristup lako dostupnim i praktičnim.
 - Idealna lokacija – savršeno za kombinaciju urbanog obilaska i fine dine-a u jednom danu.
 - Restoran možete posetiti kao deo manje poznate, ali autentične kulinarske ture "jakartanskog zapada".
 
 Paradise Dynasty u Jakarti uspešno kombinuje vrhunsku kinesku kuhinju, luksuzan ambijent i pristup velikim gradskim destinacijama, ostavljajući trajan utisak na sve posetioce.

I recently visited Kemangi Resto and had an enjoyable dining experience. The food was delicious, the ambiance was inviting, and the service was excellent.
 
 I started with the crispy tofu, which had a perfect golden crunch on the outside while remaining soft on the inside. It paired well with green chilly-cabe, making it a great appetizer, sweet corn fried, chicken satay, goat satay (a bit hard to bite), gado gado, bitter melon, fried noodles and I also had fried banana, which was beautifully crispy with a warm, sweet center—a delightful way to end the meal.
 
 The restaurant’s decor also stood out. The wall art added a unique charm, giving the place a cozy and welcoming feel. Even the to-go packaging was well thought out, ensuring that leftovers stayed fresh.
 
 One downside was the parking situation—it was quite complicated and overcrowded, making it a bit of a hassle to find a spot. If you plan to visit, consider arriving early or being prepared for some parking challenges.
 
 Overall, Kemangi is a spot I’d recommend for anyone looking for flavorful dishes and a pleasant atmosphere. Whether dining in or taking food to go, it’s a great choice!

 Sekarang bayar sudah bisa pakai Qris. Dulu hanya cash, berlanjut transfer dan sekarang sudah bisa qris.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Indikator yg sempurna
 
 Makanan ⭐⭐⭐⭐
 Udh sering kesini ampe lebih dari 10x karena memang enak, cuman kemarin tanggal 28/12/25 saya kesini lagi dan mesen kepala dan kaki kambing kuah susu, dan dibandingkan yg sebelum-sebelumnya rasa yg sekarang bumbunya kurang mantep, kurang gurih asin soalnya biasanya yg saya makan seenggaknya gurihnya berasa, mungkin bisa jadi evaluasi lagi bagi pemilik dari masukan customer.
 
 Untuk rekomendasi udh pasti soto daging kuah susu dan sop kambing kuah susu
 
 Layanan ⭐⭐⭐⭐
 Standar, kalo mesen makanan langsung ke meja penjual/kasir dan untuk minuman biasanya bakal ditawarin langsung sama pramusaji. Meja juga rajin di bersihkan, pelayan juga gak kaku jadi untuk bapak" yang suka bikin father jokes bakal nyambung.
 
 Suasana/tempat ⭐⭐⭐
 Standar lah rumah makan tendaan pinggir jalan biasa yang nggak banyak pernak-pernik tapi mendahulukan cita rasa kuliner, sekarang udh di upgrade ada tempat cuci tangannya, cuman banyak pengamen makan disitu 15 menit bisa ada 4 pengamen yang ganti-gantian jadi buat yang baik hati harus nyiapin receh, oh iya nggak ada tempat parkir khusus jadi seadanya aja (ada tukang parkir) kalo yg bawa mobil biasanya disamping tenda bisa 3 mobil tapi selebihnya biasanya parkir di masjid (depan rumah makan ada masjid tinggal nyebrang).

Sepertinya ini salah satu Soto Betawi yang enak dan ter worth it, lokasinya dekat setu babakan, Jagakarsa.
 Kalau pas jam makan siang full pengunjung.
 Tersedia berbagai macam soto dan sop berbagai macam toping, harga 1 porsi rata rata 30ribuan, 1 porsi nya banyak, isiannya banyak, menurut saya 1 porsi nya bisa buat 2 orang.
 Ada juga tersedia kerupuk dan emping.
 1 porsi soto betawi sepertinya memang belum dikasih garam, jadi kita bisa tambahkan garam dan racik sendiri sesuai selera dengan tambahan bumbu dan sambal yang ada di meja makan.
 Kuah sotonya dengan kuah susu gurih dengan tambahan minyak samin yang menambah cita rasa khas soto betawi.
 Sopnya juga enak, kuah segar dengan tambahan wortel, tomat dan kentang.
 Tempat makannya lumayan luas.
 Parkir kendaraan mobil terbatas, tapi pengunjung bisa parkir di Halaman masjid yang ada tepat disebrangnya, tentunya dengan membayar ongkos parkir.
 Pelayanannya juga sigap dan cepat, karena karyawannya banyak.

Soto betawi dan sop daging

 Metode payment ga sempet nanya bisa debit/qris gak? Sebaiknya siapkan cash ajah..
 
 Dimana lagi bisa makan sop kaki kambing jam 10 pagi !
Soto dan sop nya sama2 enak, mana rame banget yg makan ditempat dan bungkus

Endulll... murah meriah banyak, berlokasi di depan masjid dan dekat setu babakan.

Alternatif makanan rumahan ala Jawa Tengah dengan tempat yang nyaman dan parkiran luas di area Ciganjur/Cipedak, disertai lesehan malam hari di area parkir. Bagi yang kurang terbiasa, mungkin masakan cenderung terasa manis ketimbang asin, tapi tidak terlalu berlebihan. Salut dengan ibu owner yang menyajikan sendiri pesanan tamu meskipun terlihat ada beberapa pegawai yang membantu. Interaksi langsung antara pemilik restoran dan tamu pastinya memberi nilai tersendiri.

Wah, gak heran top rated, beneran makyus dan top markotop kalo boleh mengutip alm. Pak Bondan. Tampilannya sederhana, tapi sangat kaya rasa, dan pedes! Pedes yang nikmat, bikin pengen makan lagi, dan lagi.
 
 Saya pesan Nasi dengan Krengsengan, Sambal Ati dan Sayur Cabe (isinya tahu, ikan tongkol dan cabe tentunya). Kresengannya pedas manis, dan empuk, sayur cabe nya juara, kuahnya comfort food banget. Sambel ati nya juga ok untuk mengimbangi kedua item utama tadi.
 
 Minum nya wedang jahe dan minuman ini pun terasa pekat, nonjok di tenggorokan, jahenya terasa banget. Badan jadi anget karena pedas cabe dan rempah jahe.
 
 Saya gak ada rencana kesini, cuma darurat aja bingung cari makan malam, tapi sumpah gak nyesel kesini ✌.
 
 Memang tempatnya relatif kecil, tapi nyaman, dengan alunan musik Jawa yang menenangkan. Ada mushola di lantai 2 jadi bisa numpang sholat. Alhamdulillah. 
 
 Masaknya gak pake lama, saya apresiasi yang masak. , mungkin buat yang lihat harga makanan yang saya order mencapai 65ribu seporsi nasi + 2 lauk dan 1 sayur, menurut saya sangat worth it daripada makan fast food di Mall, harganya sama, tapi rasa lebih nikmat disini, porsinya juga banyak lho.
Kemarin cobain angkringan di sini nasi bakarnya enak ada tongkol sama ayam, sate puyuhnya juga enak
suka banget makan disini, tempat nya bersih dan pelayanannya juga baguss, rekomendasi bgt buat para pecinta makanan jawa, jangan lupa mampir karena ada wedang jahe wedang uwuh teh poci best
